name: sd_c2_no_deleter
drl:
rule "RJ"
salience 7
when
    P($x : f0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    insertLogical(new LK2($x, false));
end
_finding: GREEN control 3x: justifier fan-out with NO WM-changer — [RJ] once both sides; t10's no-refire pin holds exactly when nothing changes (the dead-blocker leak); clause C's refire requires the left-side WM change.
